mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_board_comment.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO board_comment ( comment_id, member_id, target_type, target_id, content, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{memberId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.member_id, m.nickname, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.content, c.reg_dt, c.mod_dt FROM board_comment c INNER JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.target_type = #{targetType} AND c.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY c.comment_id DESC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.member_id, m.nickname, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.content, c.reg_dt, c.mod_dt FROM board_comment c INNER JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId} AND c.member_id = #{memberId}
